description: A rigorous a-posteriori bound transferring the Galerkin spectrum to the full transfer operator is not included in current data. Labeling the gap as only a numerical observation is thus appropriate unless further error analysis is performed.
action_taken: The finding page explicitly states that spectral gap values are numerical observations from N=40 Chebyshev Galerkin discretization, not rigorous bounds on the infinite-dimensional operator. The finding is titled 'Proof Framework' (not 'Proof') and lists this as one of 6 known open gaps. Theorem 1 (brute force to 2.1×10^11) is unconditional and unaffected. The Galerkin-to-operator transport bound (Keller-Liverani type) is documented as future work.
